description: Epic 2: Build a concise partner pitch deck using office-skills PPTX generation

userStories.title: Define deck outline and narrative arc
userStories.description: Create a structured outline for the partner pitch deck. Save as business-agents/deck/outline.md. Define 8-12 slides with title, key message, and supporting points. Narrative: Problem → Vision → How It Works → First Pilot → Business Model → Why Us → Next Steps.
acceptanceCriteria: business-agents/deck/outline.md exists with full slide structure
Each slide has: title, 1-sentence key message, 3-5 bullet supporting points
Narrative arc flows logically from problem to call to action

userStories.title: Build Problem slides — the enterprise automation gap
userStories.description: Create 2 HTML slides for the problem section. Slide 1: scale of manual work in enterprise (cost, errors, speed). Slide 2: why existing automation (RPA) fails — brittleness, no reasoning, exception handling gaps. Convert to PPTX via html2pptx.
acceptanceCriteria: Strong visual headline per slide, minimal text

userStories.title: Build Solution slides — agentic pilots hooked to real systems
userStories.description: Create 3 HTML slides: (1) Our approach diagram: Process Map → Opportunity Matrix → Agent Pilot → Scale. (2) What an agent is vs RPA. (3) Systems we connect to (SAP, Salesforce, MES, CRM). Use data from business-agents DB where relevant.
acceptanceCriteria: Systems slide shows real system names from our DB

userStories.title: Build First Pilot slide — demand forecasting agent
userStories.description: Create 1-2 slides showing the concrete demand forecasting pilot. Run `python3 business-agents/query.py opportunities CG` to pull process 4.1.1.1 data. Show: workflow (SAP + POS → forecast → S&OP), systems connected, business value (time saved, accuracy improvement).
acceptanceCriteria: Slides reference real data from business_agents.db

userStories.title: Build Business Model slide — consulting + implementation + expansion
userStories.description: Create 1 slide showing the three-phase engagement model: Discovery (2-3 weeks, process mapping + opportunity scoring) → Pilot (4-8 weeks, one agent live) → Expand (ongoing, agent library + retainer). Visualize as timeline or phases.
acceptanceCriteria: Three phases clearly shown with timeframes

userStories.title: Build Why Us / Differentiation slide
userStories.description: Create 1 slide with 3-4 clear differentiators: (1) Process-first not tech-first, (2) Pre-built agent library from APQC taxonomy, (3) Faster pilot via pre-mapped opportunity matrices, (4) Works with existing systems — no rip and replace.
acceptanceCriteria: Implicitly positions against DIY AI, generic consulting, RPA

userStories.title: Assemble final PPTX and generate visual review
userStories.description: Combine all slides into partner-pitch-v1.pptx. Apply consistent theme: professional color palette, clean fonts, logo placeholder. Generate thumbnail grid PNG for review. Follow office-skills/public/pptx/SKILL.md workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: No text overflow or layout issues
